fullName:
com.blockether.svar.internal.spec-test.Tests for auto-wrapping bare arrays when spec expects object with single array field.
   LLMs often return `[...]` when asked for a list, even when spec defines `{nodes: [...]}`..multi-element array of maps merged when spec expects map.merges split objects into single map
name:
Tests for auto-wrapping bare arrays when spec expects object with single array field.
   LLMs often return `[...]` when asked for a list, even when spec defines `{nodes: [...]}`. > multi-element array of maps merged when spec expects map > merges split objects into single map
